subcodes.first_line: O leaf that hath turned in supplication! Render thanks unto God that thou hast traversed thousands of leagues to reach thy desired destination [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبتهله شکر کن خدا را که هزاران فرسنگ مسافت طی نمودی تا بسرمنزل مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
